image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about intermittent fasting evidence.
Context visual: Intermittent fasting is more than just a trend; it’s backed by research.
Evidence visual: Studies suggest it can boost metabolism and improve health markers.
Escalation visual: But not all findings are conclusive. Some results are still preliminary.
Payoff visual: So, while intermittent fasting shows promise, more research is needed.
Cta visual: Curious about trying it? Research and consult a pro before diving in.
